rag_rules: Place assumptions in the component type annex.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Component type annexes are for interface-level contracts (assume, guarantee, eq, const).
Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names in contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `expression` to define the logic of assumptions and guarantees.
Ensure expressions use visible symbols (ports, constants).
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without corresponding ports or constants.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings (assign) in component type annexes.
